With the plan unchanged, competitive pressure mainly depends on changes in the number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 22nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 21–22 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (lingering impact of the 2019 'study buddy' incident), but the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with large short video exposure; historical admission anomalies include a gap in Shaanxi in 2022 (low attention) and a 63-point drop in the Science admission line in Sichuan in 2024 (high attention), indicating psychological fluctuations in application behavior in some provinces; Mathematics A+ (flagship discipline), Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Marxist Theory A, Control Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Law A-, Physics A-, Biology A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Pharmacy A-, etc., with 19 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 12,400 compared to 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 269,000 (+3.26%), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a neighboring province of Guangxi, making it a cross-province application; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2–3%, with a stable enrollment of around 100 in recent years, showing no significant change in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the need for a rebound after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings (odd-even year effect), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a 3.26% increase in Physics Category examinees intensifying competition, a somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin exposure attracting attention, and numerous advantageous disciplines maintaining application enthusiasm, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 7581, in the range of 7081–8081.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 山东大学在广西医学类2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为：2021年3966名（计划14人）、2022年8005名（计划13人）、2023年5169名（计划15人）、2024年19063名（计划18人） 、2025年22022名（计划14人）。五年间位次波动剧烈，2021-2022年因扩招1人位次后移约4000名，2022-2023年缩招2人位次前移约2800名，2023-2024年扩招3人位次暴跌约13900 名，2024-2025年缩招4人位次继续后移约3000名。2026年医学类总计划仅6人，较2025年14人锐减8人（缩招57.1%），且仅保留临床医学（五年制）4人和临床医学（5+3一体化）2 人，取消了护理学、药学类、预防医学等低分专业，招生结构发生根本性变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校（A类），综合实力雄厚。其医学学科起源于齐鲁大学医学院，拥有悠久的办学 历史和深厚的学术积淀，临床医学等专业在全国享有较高声誉，对考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续高涨，临床医学尤其是5+3一体化等长学制专业竞争激烈。山东大学位于山东省济南市，作为东部沿海省份的985高校，对广西考生的吸引力较强 。2026年医学类仅保留临床医学类两个专业，不再招收护理学等相对低分专业，整体录取门槛将显著抬升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年趋势分析，预测2026年山东大学在广西医学类最低录取位次约为14271名，波动区间为13843-14699名。由于2026年医学类大幅缩招且仅保留临床 医学类高门槛专业，最低位次较2025年（22022名）将显著前移，竞争加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Shandong University's minimum admission rankings for Medicine in Guangxi from 2021 to 2025 are: 2021: 3966th (plan: 14), 2022: 8005th (plan: 13), 2023: 5169th (plan: 15), 2024: 19063rd (plan: 18), 2025: 22022nd (plan: 14). Rankings fluctuated sharply over five years: from 2021 to 2022, an increase of 1 enrollment slot shifted the ranking back by about 4000 places; from 2022 to 2023, a reduction of 2 slots moved the ranking forward by about 2800 places; from 2023 to 2024, an increase of 3 slots caused a drastic drop of about 13,900 places; from 2024 to 2025, a reduction of 4 slots continued to shift the ranking back by about 3000 places. In 2026, the total plan for Medicine is only 6 students, a sharp decrease of 8 from 2025's 14 (a 57.1% reduction), retaining only Clinical Medicine (5-year program) with 4 slots and Clinical Medicine (5+3 integrated program) with 2 slots, eliminating lower-scoring majors such as Nursing, Pharmacy, and Preventive Medicine, fundamentally changing the enrollment structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university (Category A), with strong comprehensive strength. Its medical discipline originates from the Cheeloo College of Medicine, with a long history of education and deep academic accumulation. Clinical Medicine and other majors enjoy a high reputation nationwide, continuously attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with fierce competition in long-term programs like Clinical Medicine, especially the 5+3 integrated program. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, and as a 985 university in the eastern coastal region, it has strong appeal to Guangxi candidates. In 2026, Medicine will only retain two Clinical Medicine majors, no longer admitting relatively lower-scoring majors like Nursing, significantly raising the overall admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and historical trend analysis, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's Medicine in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 14,271st, with a fluctuation range of 13,843 to 14,699. Due to the significant reduction in Medicine enrollment in 2026 and the retention of only high-threshold Clinical Medicine majors, the minimum ranking will notably move forward compared to 2025 (22,022nd), intensifying competition.

For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to target Clinical Medicine (5-Year Program) as the main goal, with Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) as a stretch goal.
